title: スプリンターズSの後に・『速さ』

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following a breathtaking, electrifying race, Taiki
Shuttle conquers the Sprinters Stakes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her thrilling performance leaves the spectators
positively spellbound.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But her legs aren't ready to slow down just yet.
She's on to the race to crown the autumn King of
the Mile—the Mile Championship!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle faces two major challenges—to
conquer both the spring and autumn G1 mile
races, and to win the autumn G1 sprint!
